title: Nutty Flaky Pineapple Crumble
description: A lazy-sunday Australian dish featuring marjoram, tandoor and whole30-friendly ingredients that combines nuttiness with a flaky crust over juicy pineapple.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine butter and flaxseed. Add in the salt and mix well.
Fold in dates until fully incorporated.
Stir in coconut flakes and marjoram leaves.
Evenly distribute mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Arrange pineapple chunks over the top of the crumble mixture, ensuring they are not touching each other or the sides of the dish.
Bake for about 30-35 minutes, or until the edges turn golden brown and the filling is set. Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve warm with a dollop of whipped cream if desired.
